summary: Go test orchestration framework with modular internal packages for running assertions, schema validation, reporting, and MCP handling, managed through numbered agent-based workflows
concerns: heavy test file proliferation across multiple agent directories
potential duplication between glm-agents subdirectories and root cmd/internal
agent metadata commits polluting git history
truncated directory names suggest filesystem or tooling constraints
suggestions: consolidate glm-agents test files into the main internal packages to reduce duplication
separate agent orchestration metadata into a different tracking mechanism outside git
add integration tests to validate cross-module behavior
document the agent numbering scheme and purpose of each agent directory
